title: Río Gallegos, Santa Cruz — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Río Gallegos is a city in Santa Cruz with a population of 115,585. Southern Patagonia’s capital with strong winds, nearby penguin colonies, and the gateway to Tierra del Fuego.
